chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.146 of 2021 Zafar Iqbal Versus Mumtaz Bibi & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as office objection Nos.2A, 6, 10A, 14, 15, 17, 20, 23 not complied with since 08.4.2021. Dated: 12.12.2023 None present. -.-.- Since day one the matter is coming up for non-prosecution as office objections have not been complied with. For the first time it was fixed on 04.10.2021 when one week time was granted despite absence of the counsel and on the following date i.e. 13.12.2021 again at the request appellant’s counsel one week time was granted followed by an order of 05.09.2022 when two weeks’ time was granted. Today position is same. In fact no one is in attendance on behalf of the appellant and there is no one to intimate the Court about the absence of the counsel. Appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
